description: §12.3/§12.5 — the same server function with JSON-serializable primitive parameters (`int`, `string`) fires no E-ROUTE-004. The clean control: serializable arguments cross the wire fine.
rationale: §12.5 wire-serializability gate (param direction): primitive param types are JSON-serializable, so the gate finds nothing non-transmittable and E-ROUTE-004 stays silent.
